app.title: Show HN: VidStudio, a browser based video editor that doesn't upload your files
app.author: kolx
proposed_tests: Create a new project and check basic video editing features
Test export to different formats (e.g. mp4, avchd)
Check if VidStudio can import and edit existing footage
